title: Wrath & Glory - An Abundance of Apocryphal Adversaries
description:
A bestiary module for the Wrath & Glory system (Cubicle 7), adapting the threats from An Abundance of Apocryphal Adversaries — Nathan Dowdell's homebrew bestiary companion to An Abundance of Apocrypha — converted here with his permission.

Drop ready-to-play enemy stat blocks straight onto your maps: rank-and-file infantry, walkers and war machines, psykers, C'Tan, and the galaxy's most notorious Warlords and Overlords, each with their full weapons, talents, abilities and threat-tier options.

Current content — two factions complete:

  • Orks — 41 threats (from Shoota Boyz to Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka) plus 19 Adversary Traits and 15 Shiny Gubbinz relics.
  • Necrons — 39 actors (warriors, Destroyers, Crypteks, Canoptek constructs, the three C'Tan Shards, every named Overlord and Lord from Imotekh to Trazyn, and the Annihilation Barge, Night Scythe and Monolith war machines) plus 38 Lords of the Necrontyr items: Adversary Traits, Cryptek Arcana, and Relics of the Aeons.

The other seven factions (Tyranids, Daemonic Legions, Heretic Astartes, Asuryani, Drukhari, T'au Empire, and Malicious Miscellany) are on the way.

⚠️ Recommended companions: wng-core (icons and the Smite power), wng-apocrypha (the Ork WAAAGH! psychic powers), and wng-xenos (Necron tokens). The module installs and runs without them, but those icons, tokens and linked powers will be missing. Some mounted Ork bosses also reference Church of Steel (wng-cos) for their vehicles.

Warhammer 40,000 and Wrath & Glory are the IP of Games Workshop and Cubicle 7; this is an unofficial, non-commercial fan project.
